chinese_news.title: 氪星晚报 ｜百度：一季度营收321亿元，AI业务收入136亿元；马斯克预计今年美国将广泛使用自动驾驶汽车；巨力索具旗下十余家企业已注销
chinese_news.summary:
大公司：

索辰科技：物理AI业务目前尚处于布局初期

36氪获悉，索辰科技公告，公司股票于2026年5月14日至5月18日连续三个交易日内收盘价格涨幅偏离值累计达到30%，属于股票交易异常波动情形。公司近期实施的募投项目“物理合成数据核心技术基座构建与多领域场景示范应用项目”尚处于筹备阶段，若出现募集资金投资项目未能顺利实施、新技术开发进度不达预期、研发遭遇技术瓶颈甚至失败，将会对公司经营业绩造成一定影响。公司物理AI业务目前尚处于布局初期。物理AI技术研发投入大、技术迭代快，存在研发进度不及预期、核心技术迭代风险；同时下游行业应用场景拓展、商业化变现存在不确定性，若市场需求、行业政策、技术竞争格局发生不利变化，物理AI业务收入及盈利贡献存在不及预期风险。

智元WITA成为全国首例完成大模型备案的具身智能交互模型

36氪获悉，根据上海市网信办最新公告的上海市生成式人工智能服务备案情况，智元WITA成为全国第一款实现合规备案的具身智能交互大模

chinese_news.title: 番茄小说正推动 AI 动漫上院线，开放头部IP改编权限｜36氪独家
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜兰杰 李晓霞

编辑｜乔芊

36氪独家获悉，据多位接近字节跳动人士消息，字节旗下的番茄小说正在推动AI动漫上院线。在这一过程中，会开放番茄小说平台头部IP的改编权限。

之于番茄小说，如何更好地挖掘平台上好IP的潜力和商业价值，是一个亟待解决的难题。

一方面，以文字形式为载体的IP内容，缺乏统一的视觉形象，使得平台上的IP难以有联名、衍生品等更丰富的变现形式。另一方面，AI漫剧这一新事物迅速发展壮大，其中不乏改编自番茄小说IP的粗制滥造之作。这些内容不但没能延长好IP的生命力，反而形成了一种消耗。此时，通过可登陆院线的影视内容来探索平台IP的更多可能性，不失为一种好的尝试。

另据上述知情人士表示，字节跳动内部为番茄IP定下了影响力的目标，“想让行业内外的人觉得番茄的出品是精品的、正向的。”这一需求落到具体的业务上，上院线会是个不错的答卷。

早在2023年年底，番茄小说就官宣成立了“番茄影视”和“番茄动漫”两大厂牌，推动平台IP的影视化。过去两年间，番茄影视先后与腾讯视频、

chinese_news.title: 科氪 | 性能极限与跨界尝试：红魔11S Pro系列深度体验
chinese_news.summary:
在智能手机行业普遍面临镜头模组日益凸出、机身内部堆叠空间受限的背景下，电竞旗舰由于其对散热和功耗的极端要求，往往表现出更为激进的工业设计。作为新一代的性能导向型产品，红魔11S Pro系列通过软硬件的垂直堆叠，试图在移动终端上探索更进一步的性能上限。以下我们将从设计、理论性能释放、以及实际软硬件体验三个维度，对其进行深度拆解。

&nbsp;

一、 外观设计：纯平后盖的内部堆叠与电竞美学

从视觉和握持逻辑来看，红魔11S Pro最显著的特征在于其坚守的纯平后盖设计。在行业因大底传感器而集体妥协于镜头凸出的趋势下，这种“反向”设计在工业制造上面临着极高的空间挑战。

chinese_news.title: Agent、多模态、应用、算力一天看尽，峰会亮点在此｜5.20日，来现场一起AI
chinese_news.summary:
进入2026，AI愈发狂飙突进。围观体验之余，人人不免在心中自问：

朋友圈刷屏的“龙虾”、Harness等AI新事物，跟我到底有什么关系？真的有必要跟吗？

AI创业、AI融资如火如荼，属于我的机会又在哪里？

别人已经在用AI做视频、写代码、跑项目，我是不是已经慢了一拍？

……

到最后，几乎所有问题都会汇成同一个问题：我，到底该如何用AI？

如果你对这些问题还很模糊，不妨来第四届中国AIGC产业峰会走一趟——一天时间，把这一年AI产业最值得关注的人、事、判断，一次性讲清楚。

先提前剧透一波。

18位重磅嘉宾，1场Agent主题圆桌，1份年度榜单，1张全景图谱——所有内容都已敲定。 

阵容上，既有昆仑万维、智谱、商汤、百度、蚂蚁、MiniMax这样的行业头部，也有亚马逊云科技、硅谷Fusion Fund带来的全球视角；既有复旦邱锡鹏、港大黄超代表的

chinese_news.title: 「宇石空间」完成5亿元A轮融资，今年计划交付三枚火箭，累计融资额已达10亿元｜36氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
文 | 阿至

36氪获悉，宇石空间已完成5亿元A轮融资，由高榕创投、昆仑资本联合领投，建发新兴、蓝湖资本、弘晖基金、东证资本、臻泰资本、庚辛资本跟投；产业方股东紫金矿业、知名互联网战投、智能终端产业方联合投资，老股东高瓴创投、基石资本、千乘资本、知盛睿盈连续多轮追投。

本轮资金将主要用于火箭总装测试、筷子回收技术验证、火箭产能建设和团队建设，为宇石空间AS-1火箭首飞及后续规模化运营提供保障。

宇石空间是我们长期关注的企业，专注于大运力、低成本、快速复用液体火箭的研制。在过去一年，公司已连续完成4轮融资，加上近期交割完的A轮，其累计融资额已达10亿元。

火箭制造及发射服务作为商业航天产业链条中的核心环节，向来是资本押注的重点，而可复用火箭作为

chinese_news.title: 对话万成云商：发文章≠GEO优化，大模型不是喂什么就推什么
chinese_news.summary:
“帮我搭配一套适合海边度假的衣服。”

“帮我推荐一家适合约会的西餐厅。”

“3000元预算，买哪款扫地机器人最划算？”

这类与AI的问答正发生在全球数亿用户身上。过去，人们会把这些问题输入百度、谷歌等搜索引擎，因此产生了SEO（Search EngineOptimization，搜索引擎优化）营销。而当流量入口从搜索引擎转向AI工具，GEO（Generative EngineOptimization，生成引擎优化）也应运而生。

区别于传统SEO追求的“搜索结果排名”，GEO的核心目标是让品牌信息在AI生成的回答中被优先引用和推荐。在AI全面渗透用户信息获取与消费决策场景的时代，对于出海企业而言，做好GEO意味着抢占新的流量入口。

GEO的逻辑和SEO有什么根本不同？为什么有人说GEO是伪命题？出海企业布局GEO该怎么做？中小企业如何低成本起步……带着这些出海企业关心的问题，我们特别对话了万成云商品牌出海事业部总经理谭莉，拆解AI搜索时代如何让企业被AI看见、

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 获超千万融资，「律动节拍」用演出票撬起千亿跨城观演赛道
chinese_news.summary:
36 氪获悉，「律动节拍」已于近期完成超千万级新一轮融资，由天空工场创投基金领投，投后估值达数亿元。

「律动节拍」成立于2025 年，是一家为用户提供跨城观演全消费场景的科技型文旅服务企业。公司聚焦 “因演出行” 垂直领域，以 “让一张票成为一座城市的游乐场” 为理念，搭建了面向 C 端用户的 AI演出行程管家。

依托集团其背后的生态资源与市场化合作，律动节拍已完成演出票品、酒旅、交通、餐饮、衍生品等多维度供给接入，通过AI与大数据模型训练，将演出资源与文旅资源整合，开发成为一站式定制化的演出行程管家产品 。

本轮资金将主要用于AI 演出行程管家产品研发、行业大模型训练、全域供应链深化及市场推广。

跨城观演越火，用户痛点越显现

近年来，国内现场演出市场持续升温，跨城观演成为常态。

中国演出行业协会数据显示，2025 年国内大型营业性演出票房突破 324 亿元，跨城观众占比普遍超过 60%，热门场次外地观众占比甚至达到 90%。

TOP 3 大新闻

多款燃油车大降价，降幅最高近30%

日前，长安汽车旗下长安逸动经典版正式上市，新车售价6.49万元，限时享23000元购车现金优惠；相较于指导价8.79万元降幅达到26%。该款车型还享有限时的保养礼和流量礼。

其实，近期多家燃油车都开启了降价模式：起亚新狮铂拓界一口价10.99万元，较指导价15.49万元降29%；捷豹路虎5月12日推出限时“新发现”价；奇瑞4月中旬开展促销，综合补贴最高4万元；速腾2026款最低价11.99万元，降价3万元（降幅20%）；思域最低指导价9.7

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $80,000 by June 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: BTC slipped below $77k today amid bond vigilante fears and Fed rate-hike signals; sharp technical breakdown after May gains reversed.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk live markets; CNBC 10-year Treasury yield at highest in a year

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Federal Reserve raise rates in July 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Yardeni explicitly predicts July hike despite Warsh appointment; global bond vigilantes pushing yields higher on inflation fears.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC Yardeni quote + Treasury/Japan yield surge reporting

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Ethereum close above $2,500 by August 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: ETH dropped to $2k amid bear-control sentiment; Vitalik's formal verification crypto security pitch signals protocol upgrade narrative emerging.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph ETH price action; CoinDesk Vitalik quote

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Meta's headcount fall below 60,000 by year-end 2026 (post-8k layoff)?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: 8,000-job cut starting this week represents ~10% reduction; signals aggressive cost discipline in AI race.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will any major U.S. bank fail or require government rescue by December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Fed rate-hike signals, bond vigilante pressure, and aluminum/commodity cost inflation create uneven financial stress.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC Fed + Treasury yield reporting; aluminum price story

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Bitcoin's market cap exceed Ethereum's by September 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko or CoinMarketCap official market cap ranking
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Current BTC dominance ~50%; macro uncertainty and ETH's AI/formal verification narrative could shift ratio, but BTC's perceived macro hedge often wins in risk-off.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: BTC below $77k + Fed hike signals = liquidity crisis narratives favor BTC; ETH 2K suggests capitulation risk underestimated.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will MicroStrategy's Bitcoin holdings exceed 1 million BTC by June 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: MicroStrategy official press release or SEC filing (10-Q/10-K)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Saylor just announced $2B buy taking holdings to 843,738 BTC; market may underestimate conviction given macro uncertainty.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Saylor's 843k BTC position signals continued accumulation thesis; macro volatility = potential buying dip.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the U.S. Dollar Index (DXY) close above 105 by October 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Federal Reserve DXY index official publication or Bloomberg terminal
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Fed rate hike signals + bond vigilante flows = dollar strength bet, but recent inflation spike may already be priced in.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Global yields rising (Japan 30-year record high); Trump administration fiscal pressure vs. Warsh hawkishness creates DXY tension.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will OpenAI or Anthropic announce a Series-stage funding round valued above $100B by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Company press release, SEC filing, or major news outlets (Reuters, Bloomberg, TechCrunch)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Leopold Aschenbrenner's $13.6B AI play signals mega-capital flowing to compute/AI; both OpenAI and Anthropic likely in fundraising mode.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Ex-OpenAI exec betting on crypto miners + AI; Meta 8k layoffs = AI TAM consolidation pressure favors well-capitalized incumbents.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will NVIDIA's stock price close above $150 by November 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Yahoo Finance or NASDAQ official closing price
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: AI capex demand (Aschenbrenner, Saylor, Meta AI play) should support semiconductor cycle, but Fed rate hikes and valuation pressure are real headwinds.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: AI facility buildout (HIVE $58M Toronto AI plot) signals data center/GPU demand surge; Fed tightening may slow enterprise capex.

investment_theses.thesis: Long Bitcoin as inflation hedge against Fed rate-hike cycle and bond vigilante repricing; DXY strength supports BTC macro narrative.
supporting_signals: BTC fell below $77k on May demand reversal, but Yardeni + global yield surge suggest macro volatility = capitulation dips
Saylor's $2B buy + 843k+ BTC position signals institutional conviction despite near-term pullback
Treasury 10-year at 1-year high; Japan 30-year at record = capital rotation into USD/hard assets
investment_theses.counter_view: Fed rate hike in July 2026 crushes risk assets; BTC re-test $60k floor if liquidity dries up or equities enter bear market.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC spot via Coinbase, Kraken; or BTC June 2026 futures on CME with 2:1 leverage; hedge with short DXY via currency ETF (UUP) for macro tail risk.

investment_theses.thesis: Short Ethereum vs. Bitcoin (long BTC/ETH ratio) as macro uncertainty favors digital gold over scaling narratives; formal verification hype insufficient to offset liquidity pressure.
supporting_signals: ETH broke $2k; traders say 'bears in control'; Vitalik's formal verification pitch = narrative patch, not catalyst
Meta + other mega-cap AI spend = GPU/compute demand, not Layer 1 demand; ETH staking yield unlikely to offset macro de-risking
Fed hike signal + bond vigilante flows = crypto traders exit correlated alts, rotate to BTC store-of-value
investment_theses.counter_view: ETH re-couples to DeFi/staking yield cycle if rates stabilize; Ethereum 2.0 Shanghai + Shanghai + future upgrades = execution risk underestimated.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC/ETH ratio via Binance or Deribit perpetuals (2:1 long BTC, 2:1 short ETH); or synthetic via spot long BTC + short ETH on Uniswap V4.

investment_theses.thesis: Long semiconductor capex (NVDA, MU) into 2026 as AI infrastructure build-out (Saylor, Aschenbrenner, HIVE) sustains GPU/chip demand despite Fed tightening headwinds.
supporting_signals: Leopold Aschenbrenner ($13.6B AI play) betting on crypto miners + inference = sustained GPU demand beyond 2024 AI hype
HIVE buys $58M Toronto AI facility; Saylor accumulates 843k BTC = infrastructure capital unlocks compute capex cycle
Meta AI R&D (136B yuan Q1 revenue for Baidu AI) = enterprise capex shift from software to silicon is real
investment_theses.counter_view: NVIDIA valuation extended (180+ P/E); Fed July hike triggers capex pause; Open AI's o1/reasoning models saturate GPU supply, demand cliff by Q4 2026.
investment_theses.expression: Long NVDA via equity or call spreads (June 2026 $140 calls, sell $160 calls); or long MU (Micron memory exposure to AI data centers) via stock or 90-day call spreads.

investment_theses.thesis: Long USD/DXY as bond vigilantes force Fed rate hikes despite Warsh dovishness; global yield curve inversion = safe-haven dollar flows.
supporting_signals: 10-year Treasury yield highest in 1 year; Japan 30-year yield at all-time record = synchronized global re-pricing
Yardeni + Warsh appointment uncertainty = market still pricing in July hike; bond market via pricing more rate-hike odds than Fed guidance
Trump admin fiscal pressure (ballroom funding fight, IRS lawsuit settlement $1.7B) = inflation narrative stays alive, supports DXY rally
investment_theses.counter_view: Warsh appointed = dovish pivot; Fed cuts by Q4 2026 if data softens; DXY rolls over to 100 if risk assets stabilize.
investment_theses.expression: Long DXY via 3x inverse bond ETF (PST) or long USD/EUR and USD/JPY carry on CME futures; or long short-term Treasury yields via TYX options (up-side gamma).

investment_theses.thesis: Short mega-cap tech (Meta, Anthropic proxies) into 2026 as cost-of-capital shock from rate hikes + aggressive AI capex undermine profitability; layoff cycle signals peak capex.
supporting_signals: Meta 8k job cut this week = Zuckerberg conceding AI burn unsustainable; profitability reset risk into 2026
Eric Schmidt booed at graduation over AI job fears = sentiment inflection; enterprise AI adoption slower than 2024 hype
Aschenbrenner's 'massive $13.6B play' suggests AI capex concentration in startups/specialized players, not incumbents
investment_theses.counter_view: Meta AI moat (30B+ user base, real ad feedback loops) = AI pivot works; 8k cut = healthy cost discipline; Meta re-rates higher by 2027.
investment_theses.expression: Short META via 3-month put spreads ($480 puts, sell $450 puts); or equal-weight short FANG (QQQ) vs. long Magnificent 7 defensives (MSFT, AAPL) via hedge.
